If you mean the time available in your schedule between your prior meeting and the lunch: the "Team Sync" ends at 11:00, so you have 01:30.

If you meant time remaining from right now until the lunch start, I don’t have the current time (only the current date). Do you want me to:
- calculate time until 12:30 using your current local time (please tell me the current time), or
- use the gap between events (01:30) shown above?
